data.title: Swine farm auction in Clinton, NC on Oct 16, 2025, by Iron Horse Auction Co. featuring 6 multi-farm opportunities.
data.description: In Clinton, North Carolina, on October 16, 2025, Iron Horse Auction Co., Inc. from Rockingham, NC, disclosed details of a Turnkey Swine Farm Portfolio Auction involving 6 Multi-Farm Opportunities in Sampson County, North Carolina. The online-only auction is scheduled to take place from October.

data.title: TraceLink introduces Agentic Orchestration: Digitally transforming global supply chains in healthcare & life sciences.
data.description: Announcing the launch of Agentic Orchestration: a groundbreaking approach where digital specialists can perceive, reason, and act. Boston, October 16, 2025 - TraceLink, the leading end-to-end digital network platform facilitating intelligent supply chain orchestration, unveiled a revolutionary phase in supply chain evolution. With their innovative solution, they are set to redefine the industry standards and enhance operational efficiency.

data.title: U.S. regional banks suffer worst drop since Trump tariff shock, with SPDR S&P Regional Banking ETF plunging 6.1% in single-day performance, driven by renewed fears of credit deterioration and unexpected loan losses at mid-sized lenders. Financial Select Sector SPDR Fund also slid 2.8%.
data.description: Following its most robust two-day increase in nearly a year earlier in the week, U.S. regional banks experienced a significant turnaround on Thursday. The SPDR S&P Regional Banking ETF (NYSE: KRE) plummeted by 6.1% in afternoon trading, marking its most substantial single-day decline since April 4, in comparison to the April 2025 Trump tariff shock. The sudden shift was prompted by concerns of credit quality weakening and unforeseen loan impairments at certain medium-sized lenders, just as market confidence had surged due to anticipated rate cuts and strong bank profits. While smaller to medium-sized banks were hardest hit by the sell-off, larger Wall Street institutions felt the repercussions as well. The Financial Select Sector SPDR Fund (NYSE: XLF) dropped by 2.8%, positioning it as the weakest performing S&P 500 sector. This development comes after a short-lived period of optimism in the financial sector.

data.title: Cellectis showcased potential of lasme-cel for patients with r/r B-ALL: ORR 68% (n=22), 83% (n=12) at recommended RP2D, and 100% in Phase 2 population (n=9).
data.description: The effectiveness results of lasme-cel Process 2 demonstrated an overall response rate (ORR) of 68% among 22 participants. At the recommended Phase 2 dose (RP2D), the ORR increased to 83% among 12 individuals. Notably, in the specific target Phase 2 population consisting of 9 participants, the ORR reached 100%.

data.title: Gracie Barra and Sports Academy introduce BarraFIT, combining martial arts tradition and training science to enhance worldwide schools and students.
data.description: A revolutionary initiative combines the rich tradition of martial arts with cutting-edge training methods to enhance the skills of students and institutions on a global scale. Gracie Barra, renowned for Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu, has partnered with Sports Academy, to bring forth this innovative program. The collaboration aims to redefine training practices by merging traditional martial arts values with modern scientific approaches. The initiative was launched in Frisco, Texas, on October 16, 2025, signifying a significant step towards revolutionizing the industry. This partnership between Gracie Barra and Sports Academy is set to impact numerous individuals and schools worldwide, with the potential to transform the way martial arts are taught and practiced.

data.title: Phoenix Tower International (PTI) recertified as a Great Place To Work® in 14 markets, emphasizing values, teamwork, and inclusion.
data.description: In a recent announcement on October 16, 2025, Phoenix Tower International (PTI) based in Boca Raton, Florida, shared its achievement of being Certified™ by Great Place To Work® in 14 markets. This certification underscores PTI's dedication to promoting a workplace culture centered around principles of teamwork, integrity, and inclusion.
Deutsche Bank expects the Fed to announce QT’s at the end of December FOMC.

data.title: Schneider Electric opens 130,000 sq-ft distribution centre in Halton Hills to bolster Canadian operations and supply chain.
data.description: A 130,000 square-foot distribution center has been inaugurated by Schneider Electric in Halton Hills, Ontario. This new facility, situated at 6 Cleve Court in Georgetown, aims to enhance the company's Canadian operations by facilitating quicker deliveries and supporting the country's energy sustainability goals. Schneider Electric, renowned for its expertise in energy management and automation, will utilize the distribution center to cater to customers within the commercial, industrial, residential, and infrastructure sectors.

data.title: Donegal Group Inc. (NASDAQ:DGICA) and (NASDAQ:DGICB) announce quarterly dividends of $0.1825 per share for Class A and $0.165 per share for Class B stocks, payable on Nov 17, 2025.
data.description: In Marietta, Pennsylvania, on October 16, 2025, Donegal Group Inc. announced that their board of directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.1825 per share for the Company's Class A common stock and $0.165 per share for the Company's Class B common stock. The dividends will be disbursed on November 17, 2025, to shareholders of record as of November 3, 2025. The company's stock trades under the tickers NASDAQ: DGICA and NASDAQ: DGICB.

data.title: Molex to acquire Smiths Interconnect to boost aerospace defense with $5B revenue, also focusing on semiconductor, medical markets.
data.description: Smiths Interconnect supplies essential components to the aerospace and defense industry, which has a market value of $5 billion. They also serve the semiconductor test, industrial, and medical sectors. Their expertise in creating cutting-edge medical interconnect solutions complements Molex's existing strengths in the market.

data.title: US and DRC co-host Economic and Investment Forum in Washington, D.C. to bolster ties; senior officials attend.
data.description: In Washington on October 16, 2025, the U.S. and the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) collaborated to host the U.S.–DRC Economic and Investment Forum. This two-day event brought together senior officials from both nations to discuss economic and investment opportunities.

data.title: Greenius partners with The Grow Group to launch 11 sales training courses for landscape professionals - collaboration announced on Oct. 16, 2025.
data.description: Professional landscapers now have the opportunity to benefit from an exclusive partnership between Greenius, a Granum product, and The Grow Group. In this collaboration, Landscape sales professionals can access a total of 11 impactful courses curated by Marty Grunder. This partnership was officially launched on October 16, 2025, and is set to provide valuable insights and knowledge to professionals in Atlanta and Toronto.

data.title: Execs from Gemini, Ripple, and Coinbase donate to Trump at ballroom fundraiser at White House, as per report.
data.description: According to reports, individuals from Gemini, Ripple, and Coinbase were present at a fundraising dinner at the White House on Wednesday night.

data.title: Bitcoin price at $108,574.22 as Dogecoin, Ethereum, XRP continue to drop. Over $693.09 million liquidated in 24 hours. Betters predict 60% chance of Bitcoin falling below $100,000 before 2026. Corporate Bitcoin adoption up 40% in Q3.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin dropped below $110,000 on Thursday amidst ongoing ETF outflows and prevailing nervous sentiment. Cryptocurrency prices: Bitcoin at $108,574.22, Ethereum at $3,899.85, Solana at $188.91, XRP at $2.35, Dogecoin at $0.1901, and Shiba Inu at $0.00001009. Coinglass data revealed 209,757 traders were liquidated in the last 24 hours, totaling $693.09 million. Top losers in the past day were Zcash, Story, and Plasma. According to Polymarket, there is a 60% probability (up from 40% on Oct. 14) of Bitcoin falling below $100,000 before 2026. Corporate Bitcoin adoption saw a 40% surge in Q3, as per a report. For a detailed story, visit Benzinga.com.
